description: A ride-hailing and map services server providing location-based services including route planning, POI search, geocoding, and taxi booking functionality.

tools.name: get_current_location
tools.description: Retrieve the current device location coordinates for use in map and ride-hailing operations.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

tools.name: maps_direction
tools.description: Plan a route between origin and destination coordinates based on the specified travel mode.

mode.description: Travel mode for route planning. Must be one of: 'bicycling', 'driving', 'transit', 'walking'.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

origin_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the origin location. Must be obtained from map-related tools.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

destination_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the destination location. Must be obtained from map-related tools.

city.description: City name for the route query. Required when mode is 'transit'.

transfers.description: Number of transit transfers required. Only present when mode is 'transit'.

route.description: List of coordinate points forming the route path, or transit segments for public transportation.

tools.name: maps_place_around
tools.description: Search for POI (Point of Interest) places around a specified location based on keywords.

keywords.description: Search keywords to filter POI results (e.g., 'restaurant', 'hotel', 'gas station').

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

location.description: Geographic coordinates of the center location for the search.

max_distance.description: Maximum search radius from the center location in meters.

places.description: List of POI places matching the search criteria.

address.description: Full address of the POI place.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

location.description: Geographic coordinates of the POI location.

distance.description: Distance from the search center location in meters.

tools.name: maps_regeocode
tools.description: Convert longitude and latitude coordinates to human-readable address information (reverse geocoding).

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

location.description: Geographic coordinates to convert to address information.

address.description: Full formatted address corresponding to the coordinates.

tools.name: taxi_estimate
tools.description: Get available ride-hailing vehicle types and fare estimates for a trip between origin and destination.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

origin_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the origin location. Must be obtained from map-related tools, cannot be assumed.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

destination_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the destination location. Must be obtained from map-related tools, cannot be assumed.

estimate_trace_id.description: Unique trace identifier for this estimate session. Required for creating an order.

products.description: List of available vehicle types with pricing information.

product_category.description: Vehicle category identifier used for order creation.

price.description: Estimated fare for this vehicle type.

tools.name: taxi_create_order
tools.description: Create a ride-hailing order directly via API without opening any application interface.

estimate_trace_id.description: Unique trace identifier obtained from the taxi_estimate results. Links the order to the fare estimate.

product_category.description: Vehicle category identifier from estimate results. Use comma-separated values for multiple categories without spaces.

caller_car_phone.description: Caller's phone number for driver contact. Pass if available.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the created ride-hailing order.

estimated_arrival.description: Estimated time for driver arrival in seconds.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: taxi_query_order
tools.description: Query ride-hailing order status and information including driver contact, license plate, and estimated arrival time.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the ride-hailing order. If not provided, queries unfinished orders for the current account.
Unique identifier for the ride-hailing order.

driver_phone.description: Contact phone number of the assigned driver.

license_plate.description: License plate number of the driver's vehicle.

estimated_arrival.description: Estimated time for driver arrival in seconds.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the ride-hailing order to cancel. Obtained from order creation or query results.

reason.description: Reason for cancellation (e.g., '不需要了', '等待时间太长', '临时有事').

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the cancelled ride-hailing order.

cancelled_at.description: Timestamp when the order was cancelled in ISO 8601 format.

refund_status.description: Status of any refund processing for the cancelled order.

tools.name: taxi_get_driver_location
tools.description: Get real-time driver location coordinates for an active ride-hailing order.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the ride-hailing order to track driver location.
Unique identifier for the ride-hailing order.

driver_lat.description: Current latitude coordinate of the driver's location.

driver_lng.description: Current longitude coordinate of the driver's location.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last location update in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: taxi_generate_ride_app_link
tools.description: Generate a deep link to open the mobile app or mini-program with pre-filled origin, destination, and vehicle type.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

origin_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the origin location. Must be obtained from map-related tools.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

destination_location.description: Geographic coordinates of the destination location. Must be obtained from map-related tools.

product_category.description: Vehicle category identifier list from estimate results. Supports multiple categories as comma-separated values. Only pass when user explicitly specifies certain categories.

deep_link.description: Generated deep link URL to open the ride-hailing app or mini-program.

from_location.description: Origin location coordinates embedded in the link in format: latitude,longitude.

to_location.description: Destination location coordinates embedded in the link in format: latitude,longitude.
